option.name: originalContent
option.value:
# Staging example environment variables for docker-compose.staging.yml
MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=ChangeThisStrongPassword123! JWT_SECRET=change-me-please-change-me-please-change-me-please-change-me MYSQL_HOST_PORT=3307 MONGO_HOST_PORT=27018 DISCOVERY_HOST_PORT=8762 CONFIG_HOST_PORT=8889 GATEWAY_HOST_PORT=8088 FRONTEND_HOST_PORT=5174
ADMIN_EMAIL=admin@supercenter.mn ADMIN_PASSWORD=Admin123!

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Staging example environment variables for docker-compose.staging.yml
MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=ChangeThisStrongPassword123! JWT_SECRET=change-me-please-change-me-please-change-me-please-change-me MYSQL_HOST_PORT=3307 MONGO_HOST_PORT=27018 DISCOVERY_HOST_PORT=8762 CONFIG_HOST_PORT=8889 GATEWAY_HOST_PORT=8088 FRONTEND_HOST_PORT=5174
CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:5174,http://localhost:5173
ADMIN_EMAIL=admin@supercenter.mn ADMIN_PASSWORD=Admin123!

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Staging example environment variables for docker-compose.staging.yml
MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=ChangeThisStrongPassword123! JWT_SECRET=change-me-please-change-me-please-change-me-please-change-me MYSQL_HOST_PORT=3307 MONGO_HOST_PORT=27018 DISCOVERY_HOST_PORT=8762 CONFIG_HOST_PORT=8889 GATEWAY_HOST_PORT=8088 FRONTEND_HOST_PORT=5174 CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:5174,http://localhost:5173
ADMIN_EMAIL=admin@supercenter.mn ADMIN_PASSWORD=Admin123!

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: Backend Microservices CI/CD
on: pull_request: paths: - "backend/**" - ".github/workflows/backend-microservices.yml" push: branches: ["main"] paths: - "backend/**" - ".github/workflows/backend-microservices.yml" workflow_dispatch:
permissions: contents: read packages: write
jobs: compile: name: Compile ${{ matrix.service }} runs-on: ubuntu-latest strategy: fail-fast: false matrix: service: - discovery-service - config-service - auth-service - product-service - map-service - user-service - gateway-service defaults: run: working-directory: backend/${{ matrix.service }} steps: - name: Checkout uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Set up JDK 21 uses: actions/setup-java@v4 with: distribution: temurin java-version: "21" cache: maven
- name: Compile run: ./mvnw -DskipTests compile
docker-images: name: Build and Push Backend Images if: github.event_name != 'pull_request' runs-on: ubuntu-latest needs: compile strategy: fail-fast: false matrix: include: - service: discovery-service image: scn-discovery-service - service: config-service image: scn-config-service - service: auth-service image: scn-auth-service - service: product-service image: scn-product-service - service: map-service image: scn-map-service - service: user-service image: scn-user-service - service: gateway-service image: scn-gateway-service steps: - name: Checkout uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Set up Docker Buildx uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
- name: Login to GHCR uses: docker/login-action@v3 with: registry: ghcr.io username: ${{ github.actor }} password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
- name: Build and push uses: docker/build-push-action@v6 with: context: ./backend/${{ matrix.service }} file: ./backend/${{ matrix.service }}/Dockerfile push: true tags: | ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}/${{ matrix.image }}:latest ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}/${{ matrix.image }}:${{ github.sha }}

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
name: Frontend CI/CD
on: pull_request: paths: - "frontend/store-navigation-frontend/**" - ".github/workflows/frontend.yml" push: branches: ["main"] paths: - "frontend/store-navigation-frontend/**" - ".github/workflows/frontend.yml" workflow_dispatch:
permissions: contents: read packages: write
jobs: build: name: Build Frontend runs-on: ubuntu-latest defaults: run: working-directory: frontend/store-navigation-frontend steps: - name: Checkout uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Set up Node.js uses: actions/setup-node@v4 with: node-version: "22" cache: npm cache-dependency-path: frontend/store-navigation-frontend/package-lock.json
- name: Install dependencies run: npm ci
- name: Build run: npm run build
docker-image: name: Build and Push Frontend Image if: github.event_name != 'pull_request' runs-on: ubuntu-latest needs: build steps: - name: Checkout uses: actions/checkout@v4
- name: Set up Docker Buildx uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3
- name: Login to GHCR uses: docker/login-action@v3 with: registry: ghcr.io username: ${{ github.actor }} password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
- name: Build and push uses: docker/build-push-action@v6 with: context: ./frontend/store-navigation-frontend file: ./frontend/store-navigation-frontend/Dockerfile push: true tags: | ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}/scn-frontend:latest ghcr.io/${{ github.repository_owner }}/scn-frontend:${{ github.sha }}

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
# Staging Deployment (No Server)
This setup runs your staging environment locally using Docker Compose.
## Includes
- `discovery-service` (Eureka) - `config-service` (Spring Cloud Config Server) - `auth-service` - `product-service` - `map-service` - `user-service` - `gateway-service` - `frontend` (Nginx static hosting) - MySQL - MongoDB
## Prerequisites
- Docker Desktop installed and running - Ports available: `8088`, `8762`, `8889`, `5174`, `3307`, `27018`
## 1) Create staging env file
Copy `.env.staging.example` to `.env.staging` and set strong secrets.
```powershell Set-Location "C:\Users\user\Desktop\SuperCenterProductNavigation" Copy-Item ".env.staging.example" ".env.staging" ```
If your machine already uses MySQL/Mongo ports, keep defaults (`3307`, `27018`) or set custom values in `.env.staging`:
```dotenv MYSQL_HOST_PORT=3307 MONGO_HOST_PORT=27018 DISCOVERY_HOST_PORT=8762 CONFIG_HOST_PORT=8889 GATEWAY_HOST_PORT=8088 FRONTEND_HOST_PORT=5174 ```
## 2) Start staging stack
```powershell Set-Location "C:\Users\user\Desktop\SuperCenterProductNavigation" docker compose --env-file .env.staging -f docker-compose.staging.yml up -d --build ```
## 3) Check status
```powershell docker compose --env-file .env.staging -f docker-compose.staging.yml ps ```
## 4) Verify endpoints
```powershell Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8762" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty StatusCode Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8889/auth-service/default" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty StatusCode Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8088/api/v1/auth/login" -Method Post -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{"email":"admin@supercenter.mn","password":"Admin123!"}' -UseBasicParsing Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5174" -UseBasicParsing | Select-Object -ExpandProperty StatusCode ```
## 5) Stop staging stack
```powershell docker compose --env-file .env.staging -f docker-compose.staging.yml down ```
## Optional: remove volumes (DB data)
```powershell docker compose --env-file .env.staging -f docker-compose.staging.yml down -v ```
## Notes
- `config-service` reads from `backend/config-repo` mounted into the container. - Default API entry point is `gateway-service` on `http://localhost:8088`. - Frontend staging entry point is `http://localhost:5174`. - If you change config files under `backend/config-repo`, restart `config-service`.

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
FROM maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-21 AS build WORKDIR /app COPY pom.xml ./ COPY src ./src RUN mvn -DskipTests package
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre WORKDIR /app COPY --from=build /app/target/*.jar /app/app.jar EXPOSE 8081 ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "/app/app.jar"]

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
server: port: ${GATEWAY_SERVICE_PORT:8080}
spring: cloud: gateway: mvc: routes: - id: auth-service uri: lb://auth-service predicates: - Path=/api/v1/auth/** - id: product-service uri: lb://product-service predicates: - Path=/api/v1/products/**,/api/v1/categories/** - id: map-service uri: lb://map-service predicates: - Path=/api/v1/locations/** - id: user-service uri: lb://user-service predicates: - Path=/api/v1/users/**

originalContent

option.value:
FROM maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-21 AS build WORKDIR /app COPY pom.xml ./ COPY src ./src RUN mvn -DskipTests package
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre WORKDIR /app COPY --from=build /app/target/*.jar /app/app.jar EXPOSE 8888 ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "/app/app.jar"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
FROM maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-21 AS build WORKDIR /app COPY pom.xml ./ COPY src ./src RUN mvn -DskipTests package
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre WORKDIR /app COPY --from=build /app/target/*.jar /app/app.jar EXPOSE 8761 ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "/app/app.jar"]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
FROM maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-21 AS build WORKDIR /app COPY pom.xml ./ COPY src ./src RUN mvn -DskipTests package
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre WORKDIR /app COPY --from=build /app/target/*.jar /app/app.jar EXPOSE 8080 ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "/app/app.jar"]

option.name: originalContent
option.value: spring: application: name: gateway-service config: import: optional:configserver:${CONFIG_SERVER_URL:http://localhost:8888} cloud: config: fail-fast: false

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
FROM maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-21 AS build WORKDIR /app COPY pom.xml ./ COPY src ./src RUN mvn -DskipTests package
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre WORKDIR /app COPY --from=build /app/target/*.jar /app/app.jar EXPOSE 8083 ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "/app/app.jar"]

option.name: originalContent
option.value: spring: application: name: map-service config: import: optional:configserver:${CONFIG_SERVER_URL:http://localhost:8888} cloud: config: fail-fast: false

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: spring: application: name: map-service config: import: optional:configserver:${CONFIG_SERVER_URL:http://localhost:8888} mongodb: uri: ${SPRING_MONGODB_URI:mongodb://mongodb:27017/supercenter_map_db} cloud: config: fail-fast: false

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
FROM maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-21 AS build WORKDIR /app COPY pom.xml ./ COPY src ./src RUN mvn -DskipTests package
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre WORKDIR /app COPY --from=build /app/target/*.jar /app/app.jar EXPOSE 8082 ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "/app/app.jar"]

option.name: originalContent
option.value: spring: application: name: product-service config: import: optional:configserver:${CONFIG_SERVER_URL:http://localhost:8888} cloud: config: fail-fast: false

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: spring: application: name: product-service config: import: optional:configserver:${CONFIG_SERVER_URL:http://localhost:8888} mongodb: uri: ${SPRING_MONGODB_URI:mongodb://mongodb:27017/supercenter_product_db} cloud: config: fail-fast: false

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
FROM maven:3.9.9-eclipse-temurin-21 AS build WORKDIR /app COPY pom.xml ./ COPY src ./src RUN mvn -DskipTests package
FROM eclipse-temurin:21-jre WORKDIR /app COPY --from=build /app/target/*.jar /app/app.jar EXPOSE 8084 ENTRYPOINT ["java", "-jar", "/app/app.jar"]

option.name: updatedContent
updatedContent
option.value:
FROM node:22-alpine AS build WORKDIR /app COPY package*.json ./ RUN npm ci COPY . . RUN npm run build
FROM nginx:1.27-alpine COPY nginx.default.conf /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf COPY --from=build /app/dist /usr/share/nginx/html EXPOSE 80 CMD ["nginx", "-g", "daemon off;"]

option.name: updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
